description: The SessionPermissionController component is used to change the roles or view the roles of a specific user in the current session.

fields._name: The text element showing the name of the user this belongs to.
fields._rolesButtons: A list of button elements used to assign the user this belongs to to a role.

methods.SetRole: Called when one of the ``_rolesButtons`` are touched.

usage: Not to be used directly by the user.
